name: PT Austindo Nusantara Jaya Tbk
summary: PT Austindo Nusantara Jaya Tbk engages in the oil palm plantation business in Indonesia. It operates in four segments: Palm Oil, Sago, Energy, and Others. The company offers crude palm oil and palm kernel, edamame, as well as processes tobacco; and produces sago starch. It also operates renewable energy biogas plant in Belitung Island. The company was formerly known as PT Austindo Teguh Jaya. PT Austindo Nusantara Jaya Tbk was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
